title: Identifies Cuatroblade's Return
situation: Roz recognizes Cuatroblade the moment an outsider crosses into Pisces, confirming an old power has re-entered the political and martial landscape.
knows: Cuatroblade is real and active in the present conflict.
The wielder's arrival will trigger factional reactions across Pisces.
She must control information and timing to preserve strategic advantage.
does_not_know: The wielder's true intentions and loyalties.
Whether Cuatroblade can be trusted in alliance with Corozal.
What hidden forces are moving behind the weapon's reappearance.
